sections: HCM-0.4 crate ownership and dependency contract

repo_truth: The exact three-file HCM-0.5 planning manifest is the complete review subject. Canonical 00-06 files remain unchanged and preliminary for HCM-0.5. Historical Planning Reviews 1-4 and their dispatches are immutable evidence. The current stage uses Continuation Planning Review 1 and permits Continuation Planning Review 2 only after one bounded local planning remediation. A later fresh canonical design-freeze session reserves Design Reviews 1-3 and two remediations. The exact dependency graph is: selected exhausted-budget handoff -> explicit human continuation -> R4-001/R4-002 planning repair -> Continuation Planning Review 1 -> CLEAN approved-planning closeout; bounded local planning findings only -> one remediation -> Continuation Planning Review 2 -> CLEAN approved-planning closeout or non-clean byte-identical handoff; any other non-clean Continuation Planning Review 1 -> byte-identical handoff. Only an approved planning commit authorizes the fresh design session; Tasks 3-6 and 8-10 remain prohibited until then, while Task 7 remains executable solely for a terminal non-completion handoff.
allowed_scope: Read and replay the exact three-file subject manifest and the named authority sections.
Run read-only Markdown, schema/example, link, portability, Git, review-lineage, and handoff checks needed to validate the plan.

Review the complete planning subject for internal consistency, exact dependency ordering, stage-scoped review identities, byte-identical terminal handoff behavior, and independently executable future design-review budget.
non_goals: No repository edits, commits, new dispatches, global handoff, ledger write, or user task hop by the reviewer.

No canonical 00-06 design edits, 05 contract changes, Rust, Cargo, runtime, CLI, Tauri, SDK, Substrate, dock implementation, HCM-0.6 activation, HCM-0.9 change, catalog leaf, or substantive semantic redesign.

Do not treat a planning review as final-design review, rename a continuation review Review 5, schedule Design Review 4, rewrite historical dispatches/handoffs, or authorize canonical design work from a non-clean planning subject.
tasks: Replay the complete three-file subject manifest and aggregate fingerprint before reviewing content.

Verify HCM-0.5-R4-001 is repaired: no terminal review permits a local subject correction; every non-clean terminal review transitions to a non-completion handoff with the identical manifest/fingerprint and no intervening subject-byte change.

Verify HCM-0.5-R4-002 is repaired: Tasks 3-6 and 8-10 are prohibited until continuation planning is independently CLEAN, while Task 7 remains executable for the required terminal non-completion handoff.
Verify the exact dependency graph in repo_truth is represented consistently in SPEC.md, plan.md, and todo.md without an unreachable handoff or premature canonical-design branch.

Verify historical Planning Reviews 1-4 remain unchanged; Continuation Planning Reviews 1-2 are distinct and permit at most one remediation; Design Reviews 1-3 are reserved for the fresh future session and permit at most two remediations; every stage stops immediately on CLEAN; no continuation Review 5 or Design Review 4 exists.

Review whether the future execution plan still fully closes the HCM-0.5 semantic questions, owner boundaries, process-dock posture, HCM-0.4 regression boundary, proof-before-review ordering, and two-commit closeout without adding implementation authority.
Review non-goals, current-session scope, exact clean and non-clean closeout paths, and the rule that planning review never satisfies final-design review.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact file/line, violated authority/objective, impact, smallest remediation, and missing verification. Return CLEAN only if no actionable planning finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: Authorized terminal finding HCM-0.5-R4-001: terminal non-clean subject bytes must be preserved unchanged into the non-completion handoff.
Authorized terminal finding HCM-0.5-R4-002: the pre-planning-clean task prohibition must exclude Task 7 while continuing to block canonical design, proof, completion, and implementation tasks.
Historical stage: immutable Planning Reviews 1-4 and Remediations 1-3; no renumbering or rewrite.
Continuation stage: maximum two complete-subject reviews, maximum one remediation, stop immediately on CLEAN, and stop after Continuation Planning Review 2.
Future design stage: maximum three complete final-design reviews, maximum two remediations, stop immediately on CLEAN, no Design Review 4, and honest byte-identical handoff on terminal non-clean.

Verification evidence: planning subject phrase/state assertions passed; changed paths are exactly the three packet files; all four historical dispatches match HEAD; archive boundary and negative self-test passed; all three handoff validator modes passed; git diff --check passed.
stop_conditions: Return a Required finding if the planning packet contains any actionable defect, including an inconsistent task edge or review-stage transition.
Return blocked if the exact subject/authority or required read-only capability is unavailable.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
Do not authorize canonical design edits, implementation, HCM-0.6, HCM-0.9, Review 5, or Design Review 4.
